MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, VIKRAM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUL-27-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON AUG-02-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
